channel.title: Go Humble! RSS BOOKS
channel.description: Awesome RSS Feeds about HumbleBundle books bundles!

item.title: Love and Rockets and More: The Collected Hernandez Bros. by Fantagraphics
item.description: Magical realism meets the alt comic scene
item.content:encoded: Lovers of comics, fantasy, and any combination of the two will want to check out this comprehensive collection of everything published by the Hernandez brothers! The prolific trio is best known for their Love and Rockets series, which is included here in its entirety, plus Love and Rockets: The Covers and Love and Rockets: The Sketchbooks. (And if you’re a newbie to the series, we recommend starting with The Love and Rockets Primer!) But that’s not all: We’ve also included Maggie the Mechanic, Proof That the Devil Loves You, and Psychodrama Illustrated, along with a ton of other miniseries and one-shots to choose from. Pay what you want for the full Hernandez brothers experience, and support the ACLU with your purchase!

item.title: Dread & Darkness: A Horror Megabundle by Open Road Media
item.description: Don’t read these with the lights off
item.content:encoded: Horror fans, we’ve got quite the bundle for you. If you’ve been searching for a really good, really spooky, really frightening novel—or two, or three, or fifty—our latest bundle includes a whole library of classic and modern horror fiction from Open Road Media! Shiver and shake at the spooky short stories in Brian Lumley’s Fruiting Bodies and Other Fungi! Experience the true horrors in the source material in John Ajvide Lindqvist’s Let Me In! Discover an urban fantasy populated by old gods and guys with rodent superpowers in China Miéville’s debut novel King Rat! There’s even more to enjoy, including classics by horror veterans like Richard Matheson and Robert McCammon, as well as new favorites from Stephen Graham-Jones and John Shirley, so grab this bundle while you can and support Save the Children with your purchase!

item.title: LLM and Agentic AI Career Accelerator Bundle by Packt
item.content:encoded: Learn how to create your own LLMs and agents that understand, generate, and process human-like text by analyzing massive datasets using deep learning. Inside this 20+ course library, you’ll gain expert insights from practical lessons like Learn Python Programming, 4E and the LLM Engineer's Handbook. These massively efficient tools save you time and effort so you can prioritize other important tasks and systems. Get the very best tech courses powered by the pros at Packt and help support World Central Kitchen with your purchase!

item.title: Dive into DC's Vertigo Comics by DC Comics
item.content:encoded:
Start February with a curated bundle of adult-themed titles from Vertigo by DC Comics! Dive into deep thinking and hard-hitting themes like V for Vendetta: 30th Anniversary Deluxe Edition and Ex Machina: Book One that don’t dance around the sexuality, addiction, profanity, and horrific brutality of real life. Get all the amazing writing, character development, and art direction you know and expect from DC Comics—all for a price you choose. Pay what you want and help support The BINC Foundation with your purchase!

The titles in this bundle are available through Neon Ichiban. To access the content, create or log in to your Neon Ichiban account. Specific titles called out above are available for highest purchase tier, not all titles are included in lower tiers.

item.title: Protest Power Zines and Lit by Microcosm
item.description: Know your rights and support your community
item.content:encoded: If you’re not already an expert on collective action, mutual aid, and knowing your rights and the rights of those around you, this is the bundle for you. If you are already an expert on all of those things, this is also the bundle for you, since there’s always more to learn when it comes to supporting your community! Microcosm has the goods: a whole library of zines and informational literature about everything from organizing inclusive events and mutual aid to advice on sharing power and how to keep organizations from using the justice system against you. There’s no better time than now to arm yourself with as much information as you can, so get these ebooks at the low price of your choosing, and support the ACLU with your purchase!

item.title: Shadowrun Fourth Edition Complete Collection by Catalyst Game Labs
item.description: The future like you’ve never imagined it before
item.content:encoded:
Calling all deckers: act now to get the complete collection of Shadowrun 4th Edition ebooks—no hacking required!! Immerse yourself in the lore of your new home with the Sixth World Almanac, learn the tricks you need to master Street Magic, build your team with the Runner’s Companion and Arsenal, and kick things into high gear with the Anniversary Printing of the Shadowrun 4th Edition corebook. There are almost 100 files to explore, from lorebooks to guides on corporate intrigue, parabotany, and mission modules, so get this bundle uploaded into your cyberdeck ASAP, and support the ACLU with your payment at the price of your choice!

Codes are redeemable through DriveThruRPG. Codes expire, redeem before March 19th, 2027.

item.title: The Ultimate Top Cow Science Fiction & Fantasy Comics by Top Cow
item.description: Expand your mind…and your comics library
item.content:encoded: There’s no better time than right now, right this second, to dive into a new world and discover your next favorite comic series! This bundle from our pals at Top Cow showcases the very best of this publisher’s science fiction and fantasy offerings, and we guarantee you’ll find something to love in these expansive, imaginative stories. Feel the rage of Berserker, a superhero thriller series produced by Milo Ventimiglia during his Heroes days. Uncover a Cold War “Ultra Sapiens” mystery in Hunter-Killer. Delight in the relatably awkward romance and misadventures of Greek mythology retelling Punderworld. There are 41 great comics to choose from in this huge bundle, so get it now at the price of your choice, and support the bookstore and comic shop charity BINC with your purchase!

item.title: Indie Comics United: A Super Bundle of Awesome Stuff
item.description: The best of indie comics at your fingertips!
item.content:encoded: Indie comics and their publishers are having a moment like never before, and what better way to celebrate this achievement than by putting together a bundle of the best of the best? And even better than that?? You can get all of these comics delivered right to your inbox at the low price of your choice!! We’ve partnered with a bunch of indie publishers: Ablaze, Action Lab, American Mythology Productions, Battle Quest Comics, Drawn & Quarterly, Dynamite Entertainment, Fantagraphics Books, Heavy Metal, Living The Line Books, Valiant Entertainment, Zenescope, Hermes Press, and Green Ronin Publishing to support their shared goal of encouraging bold ideas and creativity in their creators and readers, bringing you some of their most beloved titles, like quirky time travel graphic novel There’s No Time Like the Present, intimate queer family drama Stone Fruit, fairy tale reimagining Grimm Tales of Terror, sci-fi epic Moonray, and the newly revamped Heavy Metal! You choose what you pay for all of these and more, and every purchase supports the Comic Book Legal Defense Fund!

item.title: ESP32, Raspberry Pi, Arduino and Maker Classics by Make
item.content:encoded: Learn how to create and program your own devices using key open-source technologies with our latest Tech Book Bundle. Master widely adopted and approachable platforms like Raspberry Pi, ESP32, and Arduino inside this 20+ ebook library. Enhance your style with wearable electronics, tap into the hidden universe of radio waves, reclaim personal time through home automation, and more! Pay what you want for this amazing bundle, and help prepare kids for the future through Code.org.

item.title: Best of Humble Bundle: Terry Pratchett's Discworld by HarperCollins Encore 2026
item.content:encoded:
Discover Sir Terry Pratchett's Discworld, the beloved comic fantasy universe that’s brimming with wit, wisdom, and wonder. Start where it all began in the seminal novel The Colour of Magic, which follows the misadventures of the inept wizard Rincewind as he serves as tour guide to Twoflower, Discworld's first-ever sightseer. The hapless duo’s journeys continue in The Light Fantastic and Sourcery, where the scale of world-threatening hazards (and accompanying absurdities) increase exponentially. You’ll get over 35 Discworld novels in all, touching all corners of this whimsical realm and all manner of its denizens, and you’ll help Room to Read with your purchase!

The titles in this bundle are available through Kobo.com. To access the content, create or log in to your Kobo.com account.

item.title: Cookbooks, Playbooks, and Workbooks by O'Reilly
item.content:encoded: Calling all innovators, changemakers, rule breakers, and beyond. Level up your tech skills with the latest Humble Tech Book Bundle in partnership with the experts at O'Reilly. This massive bundle tackles how to build large language models for security with secure AI applications, how to use essential data management tools, and so much more. Pay what you want for professional-led courses like Data Engineering Design Patterns: Recipes For Solving the Most Common Data Engineering Problems, and help support Code for America with your purchase.

item.title: Sex, Love & Everything In-Between: The Sequel by Cleis Press
item.content:encoded:
Heat up your Valentine’s Day plans with this bundle of sex ebooks—you heard us, ebooks all about sex, from our friends at Cleis Press! Become the sex god, goddess, or nonbinary deity you always dreamed you would be, or simply look up more information on a position or toy you were always afraid to ask about. It’s all here, from guides to kink, sexercise, and the kama sutra, to good sexual citizenship manuals and hints for how to keep things interesting in the bedroom every single time. This bundle is for couples, multi-partner relationships, and for singles just looking to have a good time or searching for tips on going it solo, so grab it while you can at the price of your choice, and choose your own charity to support with your purchase!

The content in this bundle is intended for mature audiences. User discretion is advised.

item.title: Erotica for Women by Cleis Press
item.content:encoded:
The content in this bundle is intended for mature audiences.

Romance and erotica lovers, we are truly living in the best time for erotic fiction of any and all genres. To celebrate this, we’ve partnered with Cleis Press for a bundle of erotica, romance, and sex writing from the past decade-plus, just in time for Valentine’s Day! This ebook bundle has 37 books total with a little something for everyone: erotica for women and femmes, bondage erotica, gay erotica, lesbian erotica, gay and lesbian romance, and, yes, even a book about smokin' hot firemen. We have no doubt you’ll find exactly what you need in this bundle, so grab it while you can and help support the charity of your choice with your purchase!

item.title: Fallout Tabletop Mega Bundle by Modiphius
item.content:encoded: Already played every Fallout game? All caught up with the TV show? You can bring the Wasteland right to your living room with this Fallout tabletop roleplaying bundle from Modiphius! You’ll get rulebooks, supplemental materials, and 3D printer files for Fallout: The Roleplaying Game, Fallout: Wasteland Warfare, Fallout: Factions, and more—all the ingredients to set up your vision of Fallout’s post-apocalyptic future. Whether you’re a Vault Dweller, a Ghoul, or suited up with the Brotherhood of Steel, you’ll have everything you need to create your own adventure! Every purchase of this bundle at the price of your choice gets you a one-way ticket to the Wasteland and supports the ACLU!

item.title: Best of Humble Bundle: The Witcher + Cyberpunk by Dark Horse
item.content:encoded: Looking for awesome stories set in two of the most exciting universes around? This bundle of The Witcher and Cyberpunk 2077 books and comics from Dark Horse has the goods for stone cold monster hunters and chromed-out netrunners alike! The Witcher Volume 1: House of Glass sends Geralt on one of most harrowing adventures yet, replete with human drama and haunting terror in equal measures. Cyberpunk 2077: Your Voice is full of dazzling action and corpo intrigue—the hallmarks of a killer Night City tale. You’ll also get deep looks into these awesome universes with books like The World of Cyberpunk 2077 and The World of the Witcher, and much more! Pay what you want for this action-packed bundle and help support SpecialEffect with your purchase!

item.title: - Linux for Seasoned Admins by O'Reilly
item.content:encoded: Master the Linux command line, bootstrap yourself into DevOps competency, and gain a whole bunch of other skills to make you a better sysadmin with this bundle of books from O’Reilly! Included are 15 books covering a range of topics that’ll boost your qualifications and hone your skillset in security, containerization, version control, and much more. Pay what you want for the knowledge and confidence to succeed in a collection of in-demand disciplines, and help support Code for America with your purchase.
